Class CashAccountPosition

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.reportviews.securitydividends.AccountDividendPosition
grafioschtrader.reportviews.securitydividends.CashAccountPosition

    • updateInterestPosition

      public void updateInterestPosition(Transaction transaction, SecurityDividendsYearGroup securityDividendsYearGroup, DateTransactionCurrencypairMap dateCurrencyMap)
      Updates the interest position based on an interest transaction. This method processes interest income transactions and updates the inherited tax-related calculations from the parent class.

      The method calculates the appropriate exchange rate for the transaction and delegates to the parent class's AccountDividendPosition.updatedTaxes(Transaction, double) method to handle the interest income and tax calculations.

      Parameters:
      transaction - the interest transaction to process
      securityDividendsYearGroup - the year group context for this transaction
      dateCurrencyMap - currency mapping and date information for exchange rate calculations

    • updateFeePosition

      public void updateFeePosition(Transaction transaction, SecurityDividendsYearGroup securityDividendsYearGroup, DateTransactionCurrencypairMap dateCurrencyMap)
      Updates the fee position based on a fee transaction. This method categorizes fees into two types based on whether they are related to security transactions or are pure cash account fees.

      Fee classification:

      • Cash Account Fees: When transaction.getIdSecurityaccount() is null, indicating fees charged directly to the cash account
      • Security Account Fees: When transaction.getIdSecurityaccount() is not null, indicating fees for security transactions charged to this cash account

      Note: The method multiplies amounts by -1 because fee transactions typically have negative cash account amounts, and we want to track fees as positive values.

      Parameters:
      transaction - the fee transaction to process
      securityDividendsYearGroup - the year group context for this transaction
      dateCurrencyMap - currency mapping and date information for exchange rate calculations

    • attachHistoryquoteAndCalcPositionTotal

      public void attachHistoryquoteAndCalcPositionTotal(Map<Integer, Historyquote> historyquoteIdMap, DateTransactionCurrencypairMap dateCurrencyMap)
      Attaches historical quotes and calculates the cash position total in main currency. This method is called to finalize the cash account position calculations at year-end.
      Parameters:
      historyquoteIdMap - map of security currency IDs to their historical quotes
      dateCurrencyMap - currency pair mapping and date information for exchange rate lookups
